items.name: Drip Tray/Fan Cover
items.description: Perforated metal drip tray or fan cover located at bottom rear of oven.

items.name: Oven Light
items.description: Light bulb and housing located at top rear of oven interior.

items.name: Top Heating Element
items.description: Stainless steel coil heating element loop at top of oven interior.

items.name: Oven Brand Label
items.description: Miele brand label visible on side frame inside oven door jamb.

items.name: Microwave Oven (Built-in)
items.description: Stainless steel interior cavity with glass turntable, ventilation grilles at top rear. Control panel visible above door frame showing digital clock '10:52'. Brand label 'Miele' on side hinge pillar.
defects: Stainless steel interior shows light smudges and reflections consistent with appliance use (not damage).
One spare glass plate resting against right-hand side wall of cavity, not installed on turntable.

items.name: Kitchen Cabinet Unit (Above Hob)
items.description: White gloss finish cabinet interior with fixed shelves.
defects: Shelves and door interiors show no visible damage, scuffs or stains.

items.name: Kitchen Cabinet Unit (Adjacent Section)
items.description: White gloss finish cabinet interior with soft-close hinge mechanisms mounted high on left and right sides.
defects: Hinges (grey plastic/steel) are secure. No visible damage to door frame or shelves.

items.name: Appliance Control Panel
items.description: Mounted to the interior face of an upper cupboard door/panel. Contains rocker switches labeled 'HOB' and 'Cooker Hood', plus a multi-gang switch panel with red indicator lights.
defects: Switches are clean and functional looking.

items.name: Kitchenware (Cabinet Contents)
items.description: Grey bowl resting on white plate, glass mug/jar with handle located inside Cabinet Unit (Adjacent Section). Plastic-wrapped item visible on top shelf of same unit.
defects: None.

items.name: Upper Kitchen Cupboard
items.description: Beige/grey matte finish cabinet door open. Chrome hinges visible on left edge. Grey fabric-lined interior shelf and back panel.

items.name: Fridge/Freezer Unit
items.description: White built-in unit. Miele brand visible on control panel (P162/P163). Clear plastic/metal shelves inside main compartment. Door bins and drawers have protective film still attached in some areas. Freezer drawer frame has 'NoFrost' label. Ventilation grille at base of appliance front face.
defects: Protective film present on door bins and shelves

items.name: Upper Storage Cabinet (Above Fridge)
items.description: Beige/grey matte finish cabinet unit mounted above Miele appliance. Grey fabric-lined interior shelf and back panel.

items.name: Ceiling Downlight
items.description: Recessed white downlight fixture.

items.name: Ventilation Unit (Nuaire)
items.description: White box mounted high on wall. 'MRXBOX' branding and blue/grey intake covers with protective film present over vents.
defects: Protective film present on intakes

items.name: Electrical Inverter Panel
items.description: White box mounted high on wall (left of ventilation unit). Black digital display/screen visible at bottom center. Red logo top right corner.

items.name: Ceiling Light Strip
items.description: Linear LED light fixture recessed into ceiling soffit above utility units.

items.name: Wall Sockets and Switches (Utility Area)
items.description: Multiple double sockets and switches visible below utility units. Some have cables plugged in.

items.name: White Plastic Bucket
items.description: Sitting on floor below utility units.

items.name: Cardboard Box (Accessories/Cables)
items.description: Brown cardboard box sitting on surface below utility units.

items.name: Door Edge / Jamb
items.description: White painted surface showing latch/strike plate mechanism and hinge bracket area.
defects: Scuffs/chips mid level left hand side exterior near the metal latch/strike plate assembly. Paintwork damaged around screw holes of bracket.

items.name: Walls (Painted)
items.description: Emulsion painted walls, white/off-white finish.

items.name: Flooring (Laminate)
items.description: Oak-effect laminate flooring, light brown/grey wood grain pattern visible in the foreground.

items.name: Doorway Elements (Frame/Threshold)
items.description: White painted door frame visible on right edge; threshold strip at floor level.

items.name: White Fitted Cabinet Unit
items.description: Tall white painted cabinet unit situated to the right of the washing machine. Features a closed cupboard door with silver handle in the lower section and an open shelf/counter area above.
defects: Faint scuff/mark mid to low level on front panel, near join with wall/machine area.

items.name: Miele Washing Machine/Dryer Combo
items.description: White Miele appliance (Model WTD180 WCS visible on drum label). Features grey door frame, stainless steel drum interior with hexagonal patterning, and detergent drawer with German labels. Digital display panel active.
defects: Debris/residue trapped in bottom hinge area of rubber gasket/frame.

items.name: Stick Vacuum Cleaner
items.description: Upright stick vacuum cleaner leaning against the wall/cabinet on far right. Blue handle, silver body/base.

items.name: Items on Washing Machine Top Surface
items.description: Collection of personal items placed directly on the appliance top surface.
defects: Cords messy/tangled.

items.name: Items on Cabinet Top Surface
items.description: Various items placed on the open shelf/counter area of the white cabinet unit.

items.name: Walls (General)
items.description: Off-white emulsion painted walls. Visible sections include the wall behind the vacuum cleaner and the wall to the left of the notice.

items.name: Flooring (Tiles)
items.description: Light beige/tan square ceramic tiles with a subtle speckled finish covering the utility area floor.

items.name: Floor Transition Strip
items.description: Brushed metal threshold strip separating the tiled area from the laminate flooring.

items.name: Skirting Boards (Left)
items.description: White painted skirting boards visible at the base of the wall near the vacuum cleaner.

items.name: Socket Outlet
items.description: Double socket outlet mounted on the right-hand wall, white faceplate with red neon indicator lights.

items.name: Light Switch Panel
items.description: Partial view of a white light switch panel visible on the left edge of P174.

items.name: Vacuum Cleaner
items.description: Upright vacuum cleaner standing in the corner, blue and silver body with black hose/cords hanging down.

items.name: Washing Machine/Dryer
items.description: White appliance base visible (likely washing machine), dark glass drum window at top left.

items.name: Framed Fire Strategy Notice
items.description: Silver/grey metal frame containing a printed document titled 'Fire Strategy Notice' mounted on the wall.

items.name: White Panel/Board
items.description: Large white rectangular board or panel leaning against the wall/floor near a door frame in P172.

items.name: Walls (Cream Emulsion)
items.description: Emulsioned cream/off-white painted walls throughout the wardrobe area and visible through adjacent doorways.
defects: Faint hairline scratches mid-level to wall surface (visible in P180)
Small scuff low level right hand side at base of panel edge/wall junction (P178)

items.name: Skirting Boards (White Painted Wood/MDF)
items.description: Painted white skirting boards running along the floor junctions in the wardrobe area and adjacent rooms.

items.description: Grey stone/concrete effect tiles or polished concrete flooring visible in the main wardrobe area.

items.name: Flooring (Hallway/Adjacent Room)
items.description: Light oak effect laminate or engineered wood flooring visible through the open doorway on the left of P175.

items.name: Wardrobe/Closet Doors (White Painted Internal)
items.description: White painted internal doors with dark metal lever handles and matching rose plates. Hinges are brass/gold plated.

items.name: Door Hardware (Dark Metal Lever Handle)
items.description: Oil-rubbed bronze or matte black lever handles with round rose plates and lock cylinders on wardrobe doors.

items.name: Door Frames (White Painted Architrave)
items.description: Painted white architraves and frames matching the walls and skirting boards.

items.name: Electrical Faceplates (Black/Dark Grey)
items.description: Dark metal rectangular faceplates mounted at chest level on walls, likely sockets or switches.

items.name: Electric Radiator Heater (Black)
items.description: Cast aluminium or plastic panel heater visible through the doorway into the adjacent room.

items.name: Walls
items.description: Emulsioned off-white walls x4+ visible sections in photos P181-P186.

items.description: White painted wood skirting boards lining perimeter and internal corners visible in P182, P183, P184.

items.name: Flooring - Wood Effect Laminate
items.description: Oak-effect laminate flooring visible in P181, P182 and right side of P186.

items.name: Flooring - Carpet
items.description: Light grey short-pile carpet covering internal closet area and adjacent zones visible in P183, P184, P185.
defects: shadow marks visible on surface due to overhead lighting; no permanent stains or burns observed

items.name: Threshold Strip
items.description: Metal threshold strip separating wood laminate from carpet flooring at transition point visible in P186.

items.name: Internal Wardrobe Unit Faces/Doors
items.description: White painted MDF/Wood unit faces visible in P183, P184, P185 appearing as built-in closet dividers or wardrobe doors.

items.description: Dark taupe/brown emulsion painted walls visible inside the wardrobe alcove. High level to low level.

items.description: White painted skirting boards running along the base of the dark walls inside the wardrobe area.

items.description: Light grey/beige patterned carpet with a geometric diamond design visible inside the wardrobe area.

items.name: Threshold Strip - Wardrobe Entrance
items.description: Wood-effect laminate threshold strip at the entrance to this wardrobe section, matching the frame finish.

items.name: Wardrobe Unit - Frame & Shelving Supports
items.description: Built-in wardrobe shelving and vertical frame elements finished in grey/oak effect wood grain laminate.

items.description: Metal hanging rail system installed at mid-level within the wardrobe unit.

items.description: Upper shelf unit within the wardrobe frame, finished in grey/oak effect laminate.

items.description: Closet door panels visible on the left and right sides of the unit, featuring white painted faces with light wood-effect frames/edges.

items.description: Light grey/blue painted surface visible adjacent to the wardrobe unit (likely external door frame or wall paneling).
